title: The new Company Law" horizontal penetration ": a powerful weapon to protect the rights and interests of creditors
lead: Article 23 of the new Company Law specifies for the first time the rule of" horizontal personality denial "(that is, horizontal penetration), which stipulates that if a number of companies controlled by shareholders abuse the independent status of juridical persons to evade their debts, they shall be jointly and severally liable for the debts of any company.This rule fills the gap in the old law and puts forward new requirements for creditor protection and enterprise compliance.This article combines legislative evolution, core elements, typical cases and practical difficulties to provide operational guidance for enterprises and creditors.

blocks.text: I. The core meaning of the horizontal penetration rule

Article 23 of the new Company Law clearly stipulates that if a shareholder abuses the independent status of a company as a juridical person and the limited liability of a shareholder by using two or more companies under his control to evade debts and seriously damages the interests of creditors of the company, each company shall be jointly and severally liable for the debts of any company.This means that when shareholders evade their debts by manipulating multiple companies, creditors have the right to require these affiliated companies to jointly assume debt liability, which breaks through the restrictions of independent personality and limited liability of companies in the past and realizes the effective protection of creditors.

The horizontal penetration rule essentially contains two kinds of situations: the vertical denial of juridical personality and the reverse denial of juridical personality.By uncovering the veil of the company, the shareholders behind it shall bear joint and several liability, and then uncovering the veil of shareholders, so that other companies controlled by shareholders shall bear joint and several liability to the creditors of shareholders.Although the Company Law does not specify it, based on the logic of the "triangular puncture" rule, the creditor of the controlling shareholder may require the controlling shareholder and the multiple companies under its control to bear joint and several liability as a whole under specific circumstances.
II. Key elements for the application of the horizontal penetration rule
(1) Main elements

The plaintiff is usually a creditor of the company, while the defendant is two or more companies controlled by the same shareholder.The controlling subjects here include not only the obvious shareholders, but also the anonymous shareholders and the actual controllers.From the perspective of purpose interpretation, the horizontal personality denial system aims to prevent the independence of corporate personality and the abuse of limited liability, and to include anonymous shareholders and actual controllers in the scope of control subjects, which is more conducive to protecting the interests of creditors and will not cause unforeseeable adverse effects on other shareholders.
(2) Elements of conduct

The control subject needs to use the company under its control to commit abuse, which mainly includes two types of circumstances: confusion of personality, excessive domination and control.In the horizontal denial of personality, if the control behavior exceeds the reasonable scope and constitutes excessive domination and control, the horizontal affiliated companies shall bear joint and several liabilities;If the control act is within a reasonable range, it is necessary to examine whether it forms a confusion of personality, and if it does, it shall bear joint and several liability.
1. Personality confusion

To determine whether there is any confusion between the corporate personality and the shareholder personality, the most fundamental criterion is whether the company has independent will and independent interests, and the most important performance is whether the financial or property of the company is mixed with the financial or property of the shareholders, and whether the property of the company is independent.In case of any of the following circumstances, it may be recognized as financial or property confusion: (1) The shareholders allocate the company's funds or property free of charge at will without making financial records;(2) Shareholders use the company's funds to repay the debts of individual shareholders or allocate funds to affiliated companies without making financial records;(3) The company's account books are not separated from the shareholders' account books;(4) The shareholders' own profits are not differentiated from the profits of the company, resulting in unclear interests of both parties;(5) The company's property shall be recorded in the name of the shareholder and shall be possessed and used by the shareholder.

Under the circumstances of financial or property confusion, the following confusion often occurs at the same time: confusion of corporate business and shareholder business;The employees of the company are confused with the employees of shareholders, especially the financial personnel;The domicile of a company is confused with that of a shareholder.When the people's court hears such cases, the key is to see whether it constitutes financial or property confusion, and does not require confusion in other aspects at the same time. The confusion in other aspects is often only the reinforcement of financial or property confusion.

(2020) In the Supreme People's Court Case No. 1084, the Supreme People's Court held that there was an affiliated relationship between Yinyan Company and Bavarian.If the personnel, business and property of an affiliated company are crossed or confused, resulting in the inability to distinguish their respective property and the loss of independent personality, it constitutes a confusion of personality.If the personality of an affiliated company is mixed and the interests of creditors are seriously damaged, the affiliated companies shall bear joint and several liabilities for external debts among themselves.In the first instance, the company recognized the fact that Yinyan Company collected part of the equity transfer funds on its behalf, and said "unclear" when answering the court of first instance's inquiry about "how to deal with the financial situation", and Yinyan Company did not submit evidence to prove that it has a contractual basis for collecting the relevant equity transfer funds on behalf of the company.Besides, Yinyan and Bavarian have not provided evidence to prove whether part of the money collected has been returned to Bavarian.As there is a transfer of interests without a contractual basis between the two companies, resulting in unclear property boundaries and financial confusion between the two companies, the court of first instance has ruled that it is not improper for Yinyan Company to bear joint and several liability for the debts of the company.
2. Excessive Domination and Control

Once a company is abused by a shareholder, it will no longer have independent will and independent interests, and its independent personality will be reduced to props. If it still abides by the independent personality of the company, it will seriously damage the interests of the creditors of the company, and the company's personality should be denied at this time.Where multiple affiliated companies are controlled by the same person, husband and wife, mother and child or family, when determining whether the corporate personality should be negatived, the focus should be on whether there is any abuse of control.The following circumstances can generally be recognized as abuse of control: a subsidiary controlled by the same shareholder transfers benefits to other subsidiaries;When an affiliated company conducts transactions with other companies, the gains shall belong to one party of the affiliated company, but the losses shall be borne by the other party of the affiliated company;Withdraw the company's funds or dissolve the company first, and then set up another company with the original equipment, place, personnel and the same business purpose, so as to evade the debts of the original company.

There is confusion or cross-talk among Guofa Energy Conservation Company, Guofa Logistics Company and Guofa China Enterprise Company in terms of domicile, contact information, senior managers and business scope.According to the industrial and commercial information, recruitment information and annual report provided by Guodian Photovoltaic Company, the three companies are all located in Xicheng District, Beijing, with the same contact number, and the e-mail address of Guofa Logistics Company and Guofa Huaqi Company is the same.At the same time, Guo Liucheng, Han Xia and Wang Xueguan hold cross-posts in the three companies, and the business scope of the three companies involves machinery, electrical appliances and other related businesses.Although the relevant subject raises an objection, the court shall not accept its claim because it fails to provide valid evidence to prove it.

From the details of the five bank accounts of the Sino-foreign Development China Enterprise Company transferred by the court of first instance, it can be proved that there is financial confusion among the three companies.During 2011-2018, there was a large amount of capital exchanges between the three companies, and most of the purposes of funds were not clearly marked;The project collection and financial subsidies of Sino-foreign Enterprises are frequently and in large amount transferred out to Sino-foreign Energy Conservation Company and Sino-foreign Logistics Company;The funds transferred from the State Development Energy Conservation Company and the State Development Logistics Company to the State Development China Enterprise Company are basically equal to the daily operating expenses of the State Development China Enterprise Company.Guofa Energy Conservation Company, Guofa Logistics Company and Guo Liucheng refused to provide financial books to cooperate with the judicial audit, nor did they provide other rebuttal evidence. The court of first instance accepted the verification opinions of Guodian Photovoltaic Company on bank flow, and found that the financial confusion of the three companies was not improper.In the second instance, the relevant subject only denied the financial confusion on the grounds that the bank flow cannot fully reflect the flow of funds, and the court did not recognize it.

Therefore, the Court considers that the appeal requests of Guofa Energy Conservation Company, Guofa Logistics Company and Guo Liucheng lack factual and legal basis and shall not be supported.If the facts are clearly ascertained and the law is correctly applied in the judgment of first instance, the appeal shall be rejected and the original judgment shall be upheld.The application for retrial submitted by Guofa Energy Conservation and Environmental Protection Development Group Co., Ltd. to the Supreme People's Court was also rejected.
(3) Subjective elements

The shareholder has the intention to evade the debt.This element is usually judged in combination with the act of control and the act of abuse. In practice, under the condition of meeting other elements, the proof of this element can generally be completed without the creditor providing additional evidence.
(4) Consequence elements

The interests of the creditors of the company must be seriously damaged.The judgment standard is usually that the debtor is unable to pay off the due debts.If the creditor can prove that there is abuse, it can generally be presumed that the result requirement is met, and there is no need to prove that the debtor is insolvent.Moreover, the result element is not based on the premise that it cannot be remedied in other ways, and creditors have the right to choose to directly apply the horizontal penetration rule to safeguard their own rights and interests.
III. Key Points for Creditors to Safeguard Their Rights
(1) burden of proof

When the horizontal penetration rule is applied, the creditor shall bear the burden of proof, and shall prove that the facts of abuse, evasion of debts and serious damage to the interests of creditors are established.However, due to the concealment of abuse, it is difficult for creditors to provide evidence in practice.For this, the creditor may reduce the difficulty of proof by means of "preliminary evidence standard+application to the court for obtaining evidence".For example, if the creditor provides preliminary evidence such as recruitment information and copies of business licenses issued by affiliated companies to prove that there is a possibility of confusion of personnel and business between companies, the court may, in accordance with the principles of fairness and good faith, require the company or shareholders to further prove that there is no abuse, otherwise the facts to be proved will be established.
(2) Litigation procedure
1. Litigation status

The creditor shall determine the defendant and the third party according to whether the debt has been confirmed by an effective legal document.If the debt has been confirmed, and the creditor files a separate lawsuit of corporate personality denial, the listed shareholder shall be the defendant and the company shall be the third party;If the debt is not confirmed, and the creditor brings a lawsuit on the debt between him and the company, he also brings a lawsuit on the denial of corporate personality, requiring the shareholders to bear the responsibility, the company and the shareholders shall be listed as co-defendants;

If the debts between the creditor and the company have not been confirmed by effective legal documents, and the creditor directly brings a lawsuit of corporate personality denial, requiring the shareholder to be liable for the debts, the people's court shall explain to the creditor and add the company as a co-defendant.If the creditor refuses to increase the amount, it shall rule to dismiss the lawsuit.
2. Court of Jurisdiction

If the creditor sues the debtor company and the relevant subjects at the same time, the competent court shall be determined according to the nature of the basic creditor's rights and debts relationship;If the creditor brings a separate lawsuit after obtaining the effective judgment on the confirmation of the creditor's rights of the debtor company, it shall be under the jurisdiction of the people's court of the place where the infringement is committed or where the defendant has its domicile, and the court of the place where the debtor company has its domicile usually has jurisdiction.
3. Limitation of action

If the lawsuit is filed at the same time, the limitation of action shall be determined according to the basic creditor's rights and debts relationship;If another lawsuit is filed, the provisions on limitation of action for general infringement shall apply, which shall be calculated for three years from the date when the creditor knows or should know the damage to the rights and the obligor.
(3) Execution stage

According to the Provisions of the Supreme People's Court on Several Issues Concerning the Alteration and Addition of Parties in Civil Execution, the additional parties shall strictly follow the statutory principle, that is, the parties to the alteration and addition of execution shall be strictly limited to the circumstances clearly stipulated by laws and judicial interpretations.The subject confusion, personality confusion and property confusion do not belong to the legal situation of adding the person subjected to execution stipulated by laws and judicial interpretations.The denial of juridical personality cannot directly add the relevant subject liability at the implementation stage, and the lawsuit of corporate personality denial is the necessary procedure for investigating the liability of shareholders or affiliated companies.Only when the legal conditions are met, such as the division and merger of the enterprise, can the execution court change or add the person subjected to execution according to law.

conclusion: The horizontal penetration rule of the new Company Law provides a strong legal weapon for creditors.In a complex business environment, creditors should fully understand and apply this rule, actively collect evidence, and safeguard their rights and interests through legal litigation procedures.At the same time, the company and its shareholders should also strictly abide by laws and regulations, maintain the independence of the company's personality, and avoid falling into unnecessary legal risks.If you encounter legal problems in this respect, you are welcome to contact our law firm at any time, and we will wholeheartedly provide you with professional legal services.
